title: Smoky Crispy Japanese Feta Salad
description: A quick, smoky, and crispy salad that blends Japanese flavors with creamy feta, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat a dry skillet over medium heat and add the sliced cucumber and carrot, cooking until crisp and slightly caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the vegetables to a bowl and add the mixed greens, edamame, and feta cubes.
In a small bowl whisk together the sesame oil, soy sauce, mirin, smoked paprika, and chili flakes until well combined.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat all ingredients.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the top for added crunch and a nutty aroma.
Serve immediately, optionally garnish with extra sesame seeds or a drizzle of sesame oil.
Enjoy the smoky, crispy flavors that pair Japanese umami with creamy feta.
Make sure to keep the skillet dry to avoid soggy vegetables.
Let the salad rest for a minute before serving to allow flavors to meld.
